task_completion.description: Navigate to the pricing section and open the form to add a new pricing item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or modal titled 'New Pricing Item', 'Add Pricing', or similar is visible in the HospitalRun interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified name for the pricing item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Portable Ultrasound - Limited Bedside' is visible in the 'Name' input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified price for the pricing item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '275' is visible in the 'Price' input field.

task_completion.description: Select or enter the specified category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Imaging' is visible in the 'Category' dropdown or input field.

task_completion.description: Select or enter the specified pricing type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Per Case' is visible in the 'Pricing Type' dropdown or input field.

task_completion.description: Select or enter the specified expense account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Radiology Services' is visible in the 'Expense Account' dropdown or input field.
A success notification is shown, or the new item 'Portable Ultrasound - Limited Bedside' is visible in the saved list of pricing items.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the HospitalRun graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating HospitalRun, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered the information into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are typed into the HospitalRun form fields, rather than a separate text editor or note-taking app.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and actively being used to alter the page text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected values for the new pricing item: Name = 'Portable Ultrasound - Limited Bedside', Price = 275, Category = 'Imaging', Expense Account = 'Radiology Services', Pricing Type = 'Per Case'.
